heading: Technical and financial assistance
label: 4993 Technical and financial assistance
text: The Director may provide technical and financial assistance to Federal agencies, State and local governments and agencies, private nonprofit organizations, employers, and other private organizations that utilize or desire to utilize volunteers in carrying out the purpose of this part.
notes: Amendments1993— amended section generally, substituting single sentence authorizing technical and financial assistance for former subsecs. (a) and (b) which contained similar general authority and provisions detailing use of the general authority.Pub. L. 103–821989— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a) and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 101–2041984— substituted “(2) technical assistance and training programs, including the creation or expansion of private capabilities where possible and the development of voluntary organizations, with particular emphasis on low-income, minority, and community-based groups, or (3)” for “or (2)”.Pub. L. 98–288
Effective Date of 1993 AmendmentAmendment by effective , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 103–82section 392 of Pub. L. 103–82section 4951 of this titleOct. 1, 1993
